# ByteQuant

> ByteQuant is a four-language (Turkish, English, German, and Simplified Chinese), privacy-first collection of 89 free browser-based tools for prompt engineering, text and NLP work, calculations, everyday documents, AI workflows, developer workflows, file conversion, and explainable security pre-checks.

Canonical site: https://bytequant.org/

Languages:
- Turkish (default): https://bytequant.org/
- English: https://bytequant.org/en/
- German: https://bytequant.org/de/
- Simplified Chinese: https://bytequant.org/zh/

## Privacy and processing model

- Core tool input is processed locally in the user's browser; ByteQuant tools do not require an account.
- Tool input is not intentionally uploaded to ByteQuant application servers.
- Local storage outside Workstation is limited to a user-selected theme, a consent record, and optional non-sensitive tool-visit counts used to personalize the popular-tools list.
- Optional tool-visit counting is off until the user gives explicit consent. Refusing consent does not limit any tool, and consent can be withdrawn at any time from the site footer.
- ByteQuant does not currently activate analytics or advertising technology. Advertising must remain inactive until the required regional consent platform is configured.
- Local Agent is an explainable, browser-only semantic search and workflow planner. It is not a generative LLM and makes no remote model request. Plans and user-approved intermediate output are bounded to the current tab's sessionStorage.
- Local Agent never selects files, runs tools, downloads output, or performs a network request without user action. Its decision summary exposes matched signals, extracted parameters, reasons, and limitations—not hidden chain-of-thought.
- Voice input is offered only when the browser confirms on-device speech recognition and supports forced local processing. There is no fallback to remote recognition.
- Workstation projects are saved only after explicit use, as AES-GCM-256 ciphertext in the browser's `bytequant-workspaces` IndexedDB database. A non-extractable device key stays in the same database. This is not protection against a compromised device, malicious extension, or hostile same-origin code.
- Workstation handoff records are tab-scoped sessionStorage values. Tool selection, file input, passwords, code execution, network requests, and downloads remain user-controlled.
- Peer collaboration uses only WebRTC DataChannel with no ByteQuant signaling server, STUN, or TURN. Single-use offer/answer codes expire after ten minutes and may disclose network candidates. Live sharing is paused until users compare a DTLS-derived safety code through another channel and explicitly enable it; this is not identity verification. Some NAT/firewall combinations will not connect.
- Recipe URLs always omit output and omit input by default. Opting in to input can expose it through the URL, browser history, clipboard, messaging service, and recipient device.
- Users should still remove secrets before sharing generated output and independently verify results used in security, legal, or production decisions.
- The installable PWA caches only same-origin application resources and previously visited GET pages. Tool inputs, passwords, selected files, and generated outputs are not written to the offline cache.
- ByteQuant distributes no native APK. On Android the browser creates the WebAPK/app wrapper; users who see an old-Android warning are instructed to cancel, update the browser, remove the stale install, and reinstall from a current browser menu.
- Local file, code, and URL scans are bounded heuristic pre-checks. They do not execute content or call a reputation API, and they are not antivirus, SAST certification, or proof of safety.
- Full privacy policy: https://bytequant.org/gizlilik-politikasi
- English privacy policy: https://bytequant.org/en/privacy
- Cookie and local-storage policy: https://bytequant.org/cerez-politikasi
- English cookie and local-storage policy: https://bytequant.org/en/cookies
- German privacy policy: https://bytequant.org/de/privacy
- Chinese privacy policy: https://bytequant.org/zh/privacy

## Local Agent and tool orchestration

- Turkish Local Agent: https://bytequant.org/ajan
- English Local Agent: https://bytequant.org/en/agent
- German Local Agent: https://bytequant.org/de/agent
- Simplified Chinese Local Agent: https://bytequant.org/zh/agent
- The planner uses multilingual semantic scoring, versioned workflow recipes, bounded parameter extraction, and local error-pattern translation across the existing 89 tools.
- The tool bridge can fill an eligible text input or pass a visible result only after the user requests it. Password fields, file selectors, downloads, and execution controls remain manual.
- Architecture guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/browser-only-agentic-ai-tool-orchestration

## Visual Workstation

- Turkish Workstation: https://bytequant.org/is-istasyonu
- English Workstation: https://bytequant.org/en/workstation
- German Workstation: https://bytequant.org/de/workstation
- Simplified Chinese Workstation: https://bytequant.org/zh/workstation
- Recipe importer: https://bytequant.org/workspace?recipe=... (noindex; canonical documentation is the English Workstation page)
- Users can arrange any of the 89 existing tools as bounded visual nodes, connect output to input, and open each real tool through an explicit handoff. The visual plan never executes a tool automatically.
- Projects support multiple local documents, encrypted IndexedDB persistence, compressed URL recipes, undo/redo, auto-layout, full-catalog filters, starter flows, explainable Agent plan previews, and optional manually verified WebRTC peer sessions. There is no cloud workspace database or remote collaboration service.
- Workstation architecture guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/visual-workflow-indexeddb-webrtc-workstation

## Prompt tools

- [Prompt Kalite Denetimi](https://bytequant.org/araclar/prompt-kalite-denetimi): reviews prompt clarity, context, constraints, output format, and privacy risks.
- [Meta-Prompt Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/meta-prompt-olusturucu): creates reusable prompts that instruct an AI model to build better prompts.
- [Token Sayacı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/token-sayaci): estimates token volume, character count, and context-budget pressure.
- [Few-shot Örnek Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/few-shot-ornek-olusturucu): converts tasks and examples into structured few-shot prompt templates.
- [Sistem Promptu / Persona Şablonu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/sistem-promptu-persona-sablonu): structures role, tone, style, boundaries, and response rules.
- [Prompt Şablonu ve Değişken Doldurucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/prompt-sablon-degisken-doldurucu): fills named prompt placeholders locally and reports missing variables.
- [Prompt Test Vaka Matrisi Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/prompt-test-vaka-matrisi): drafts normal, boundary, abuse, and ambiguity cases without calling a model.

## Text and NLP tools

- [Okunabilirlik Analizi](https://bytequant.org/araclar/okunabilirlik-analizi): estimates text readability and offers revision guidance.
- [Metin Benzerlik Analizi](https://bytequant.org/araclar/metin-benzerlik-analizi): compares two texts with a local similarity score.
- [Metin Temizleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/metin-temizleyici): normalizes whitespace and common text artifacts.
- [Büyük/Küçük Harf Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/buyuk-kucuk-harf-donusturucu): converts text casing.
- [Kelime Sayacı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/kelime-sayaci): counts words, characters, sentences, and estimated reading time.
- [Metin Farkı (Diff)](https://bytequant.org/araclar/metin-farki-diff): highlights added and removed lines or words between two texts.
- [Markdown Önizleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/markdown-onizleyici): renders a live, sanitized Markdown preview and HTML output.
- [Yerel Metin Özetleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/yerel-metin-ozetleyici): extracts source sentences with an explainable word-frequency method.
- [Unicode Normalizasyonu ve Karakter İnceleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/unicode-normalizasyon-inceleyici): compares Unicode normalization forms, code points, and invisible controls.
- [Satır Sıralayıcı ve Tekilleştirici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/satir-siralayici-tekillestirici): locale-aware line sorting and controlled duplicate removal.
- [SEO ve URL Slug Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/seo-slug-olusturucu): creates stable ASCII-safe slugs while preserving unmapped code points explicitly.
- [Kelime Sıklığı ve N-gram Analizi](https://bytequant.org/araclar/kelime-sikligi-ngram-analizi): counts locale-aware words, bigrams, and trigrams locally.

## Data and developer tools

- [JSON Biçimlendirici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/json-bicimlendirici): validates, formats, and minifies JSON.
- [JSON ↔ CSV Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/json-csv-donusturucu): converts tabular JSON and CSV in both directions.
- [Regex Test Aracı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/regex-test-araci): tests regular expressions, flags, and matches.
- [CSV İnceleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/csv-inceleyici): parses CSV and previews rows and columns.
- [Base64 Kodlayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/base64-kodlayici): encodes and decodes UTF-8 text using Base64.
- [URL Kodlayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/url-kodlayici): safely encodes and decodes URL components.
- [UUID Üretici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/uuid-uretici): generates cryptographically random UUID v4 identifiers.
- [SHA-256 Özet Üretici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/sha256-ozet-uretici): creates local SHA-256 digests.
- [Unix Zaman Damgası Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/unix-zaman-damgasi-donusturucu): converts Unix timestamps and human-readable dates.
- [JWT Decoder](https://bytequant.org/araclar/jwt-decoder): decodes JWT headers and payloads locally without validating signatures.
- [HEX/RGB/HSL Renk Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/renk-donusturucu): converts color formats with a visual picker.
- [QR Kod Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/qr-kod-olusturucu): generates downloadable PNG and SVG QR codes locally.
- [Cron İfadesi Açıklayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/cron-ifadesi-aciklayici): explains classic five-field cron expressions in human language.
- [Araç Zinciri: CSV → Maskeleme → JSON](https://bytequant.org/araclar/arac-zinciri-pipeline): parses CSV, applies reviewed personal-data candidate masking, and exports JSON or CSV without leaving the page.
- [JSON Diff / Yapısal Karşılaştırma](https://bytequant.org/araclar/json-diff-karsilastirma): reports added, removed, changed, and type-changed JSON paths.
- [cURL → Kod Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/curl-kod-donusturucu): parses but never executes cURL and generates JavaScript, Node.js, Python, or PHP drafts.
- [Meta Etiket / Favicon Üretici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/meta-etiket-favicon-uretici): generates escaped SEO, Open Graph, Twitter Card, favicon, and Next.js metadata drafts.
- [JSON Schema Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/json-schema-olusturucu): infers an editable Draft 2020-12 starter schema from sample JSON.
- [YAML ↔ JSON Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/yaml-json-donusturucu): safely parses YAML or JSON and converts in both directions with bounded aliases.
- [XML Biçimlendirici ve Doğrulayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/xml-bicimlendirici-dogrulayici): validates XML syntax and creates readable or minified output with DOMParser.
- [JSON Düzleştirici / Geri Açıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/json-flatten-unflatten): maps nested data to RFC 6901 JSON Pointer paths and rebuilds it.
- [CSV Tekilleştirici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/csv-tekil-satir-ayiklayici): removes duplicate CSV records by selected columns with explicit matching rules.
- [URL Sorgu Parametresi Analizörü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/url-sorgu-parametresi-analizoru): inspects URL components, duplicate query values, and common tracking parameters without opening the link.
- [HTML Varlık Kodlayıcı / Çözücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/html-varlik-kodlayici): encodes HTML special characters and safely decodes supported named or numeric entities as text.
- [Robots.txt Oluşturucu ve Denetleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/robots-txt-olusturucu-denetleyici): audits crawler groups, root blocks, sitemap declarations, and unknown directives.
- [Hreflang Etiket Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/hreflang-etiket-olusturucu): validates locale URL clusters and produces reciprocal HTML and sitemap drafts.
- [FAQPage JSON-LD Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/faq-json-ld-olusturucu): creates valid FAQPage JSON-LD from user-visible questions and answers.
- [UTM Kampanya URL Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/utm-kampanya-url-olusturucu): adds consistently encoded campaign parameters without contacting an analytics service.

## Image and PDF converters

- [PNG / JPG / WebP / SVG Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/gorsel-format-donusturucu): locally re-encodes supported images to PNG, JPG, or WebP and rasterizes SVG input.
- [Görsel Sıkıştırıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/gorsel-sikistirici): resizes and compresses images to WebP or JPG with actual before-and-after byte reporting.
- [Görselden PDF'e Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/gorselden-pdf): combines ordered images into an A4 or image-sized PDF entirely in browser memory.
- [PDF Birleştirme](https://bytequant.org/araclar/pdf-birlestirme): merges ordered PDF documents locally without bypassing encryption.
- [PDF Bölme / Sayfa Ayırma](https://bytequant.org/araclar/pdf-bolme): extracts selected page ranges into a new local PDF.
- [Görsel Boyutlandırıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/gorsel-boyutlandirici): resizes and re-encodes PNG, JPG, or WebP with local Canvas processing.
- [Data URI Kodlayıcı / Çözücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/data-uri-donusturucu): locally converts small files or UTF-8 text to Data URIs and decodes bounded Data URI content.

## Privacy and security tools

- [KVKK Veri Maskeleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/kvkk-veri-maskeleyici): masks common personal-data patterns before sharing text.
- [Güçlü Parola Üretici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/guclu-parola-uretici): creates configurable passwords using browser cryptography.
- [EXIF/Meta Veri Temizleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/exif-meta-veri-temizleyici): inspects and removes common JPEG/PNG metadata in-browser.
- [Şifre Gücü Testi](https://bytequant.org/araclar/sifre-gucu-testi): estimates entropy, resistance, and approximate crack time without transmitting the password.
- [Dosya Hash Hesaplayıcı ve Karşılaştırıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/dosya-hash-karsilastirici): calculates and compares local SHA-256 file digests without uploading.
- [Hatırlanabilir Parola / Passphrase Üretici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/hatirlanabilir-parola-uretici): creates pronounceable synthetic passphrases with Web Crypto and no external word list.
- [HMAC Oluşturucu ve Doğrulayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/hmac-olusturucu-dogrulayici): generates HMAC-SHA-256/384/512 locally for authorized test messages.
- [Subresource Integrity Hash Üretici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/sri-butunluk-hash-uretici): creates standard SRI values from exact local-file bytes or pasted resource text.

## Calculation tools

- [Yatırım Getiri Simülatörü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/yatirim-getiri-simulatoru): models recurring contributions, return, fees, and inflation with transparent monthly compounding; it is not investment advice.
- [Ölçü / Birim Dönüştürücü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/birim-donusturucu): converts common length, mass, temperature, volume, and data-size units locally.
- [Not Ortalaması Hesaplayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/not-ortalamasi-hesaplayici): calculates weighted grades, validates total weights, and estimates remaining target scores.
- [GPA Çevirici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/gpa-cevirici): provides clearly labeled linear estimates among common grade scales; it is not official equivalency.
- [Kredi Ödeme ve Taksit Hesaplayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/kredi-odeme-hesaplayici): models equal-payment loan scenarios with disclosed assumptions and costs.
- [IPv4 CIDR ve Alt Ağ Hesaplayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/ip-cidr-alt-ag-hesaplayici): calculates network, broadcast, mask, wildcard, and host ranges with 32-bit arithmetic.
- [Yüzde Değişim, Artış ve Pay Hesaplayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/yuzde-degisim-hesaplayici): separates percentage change, percentage points, share, and target adjustments.
- [KDV / Vergi ve İndirim Hesaplayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/kdv-indirim-hesaplayici): models user-supplied tax rates and sequential discounts without selecting legal rates.
- [Süre, Mesai ve Mola Hesaplayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/sure-mesai-hesaplayici): calculates gross and net elapsed time with explicit time-zone assumptions.

## Everyday document tools

- [Kaynakça / Atıf Formatlayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/kaynakca-atif-formatlayici): creates reviewable APA 7 and MLA 9 citation drafts.
- [Fatura Şablonu Oluşturucu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/fatura-sablonu-olusturucu): builds a local invoice draft with line items, tax, totals, and explicit jurisdiction limitations.
- [Basit Sözleşme Şablonu](https://bytequant.org/araclar/basit-sozlesme-sablonu): structures a neutral services-agreement draft that requires qualified legal review.
- [Tarih Farkı Hesaplayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/tarih-farki-hesaplayici): compares UTC calendar dates, weeks, and weekdays without time-zone drift.
- [Kriptografik Rastgele Seçici ve Takım Karıştırıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/rastgele-secici-takim-karistirici): uses Web Crypto for unbiased list shuffling, low-stakes picks, and balanced teams.

## AI workflow tools

- [Aşırı Kesinlik Dil Tarayıcısı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/asiri-kesinlik-dil-tarayicisi): flags absolute or guarantee language with explainable lexical rules.
- [Konuşma Dışa Aktarma Formatlayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/konusma-disa-aktarma-formatlayici): normalizes role transcripts and JSON messages into Markdown, JSONL, or plain text.
- [Token / Bağlam Bütçesi Planlayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/token-baglam-butcesi-planlayici): allocates context limits across system prompts, history, sources, input, output, and reserve.
- [Sistem Promptu Netlik Kontrolü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/sistem-promptu-netlik-kontrolu): checks purpose, role, boundaries, priority, uncertainty, and output contracts without calling a model.
- [Rol / Persona Tutarlılık Kontrolü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/rol-persona-tutarlilik-kontrolu): compares persona rules and sample responses for lexical boundary conflicts.
- [AI Yanıt Değerlendirme Rubriği](https://bytequant.org/araclar/ai-yanit-degerlendirme-rubrigi): builds weighted, four-level human-review rubrics without calling a model.
- [RAG Parçalama ve Bağlam Bütçesi Planlayıcı](https://bytequant.org/araclar/rag-parcalama-butcesi-planlayici): estimates chunk count, overlap cost, retrieved context, and output reserve.
- [Prompt Enjeksiyonu Risk Ön Taraması](https://bytequant.org/araclar/prompt-enjeksiyon-on-taramasi): reports explainable instruction-override and data-exfiltration signals without calling a model.

## Code and file security pre-checks

- [Yerel Dosya Risk Ön Taraması](https://bytequant.org/araclar/dosya-risk-on-taramasi): inspects filename, magic bytes, extension mismatch, macro-capable types, entropy, and bounded text indicators without executing or uploading the file.
- [Kod Güvenliği Ön Taraması](https://bytequant.org/araclar/kod-guvenligi-on-taramasi): runs a time-bounded local Worker over source code for dangerous APIs, possible secrets, weak crypto, and injection candidates.
- [URL Güvenlik Ön Kontrolü](https://bytequant.org/araclar/url-guvenlik-on-kontrolu): parses a URL without visiting it and flags embedded credentials, IP hosts, Punycode, redirect parameters, and obfuscation signals.
- [CSP Oluşturucu ve Denetleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/csp-olusturucu-denetleyici): generates a secure starter and audits bounded Content-Security-Policy risks locally.
- [HTTP Güvenlik Başlıkları Denetleyici](https://bytequant.org/araclar/http-guvenlik-basliklari-denetleyici): audits pasted response headers without contacting the target server.

Localized tool pages use the same stable slug under `/en/tools/{slug}`, `/de/tools/{slug}`, and `/zh/tools/{slug}`.

## Editorial guides and site resources

- Turkish guides: https://bytequant.org/blog
- English guides: https://bytequant.org/en/blog
- German guides: https://bytequant.org/de/blog
- Simplified Chinese guides: https://bytequant.org/zh/blog
- Regex quick reference: https://bytequant.org/referanslar/regex-cheat-sheet
- Cron quick reference: https://bytequant.org/referanslar/cron-cheat-sheet
- About and editorial principles: https://bytequant.org/hakkimizda
- Frequently asked questions: https://bytequant.org/sss
- Terms of use: https://bytequant.org/kullanim-kosullari
- Contact and corrections: https://bytequant.org/iletisim
- XML sitemap: https://bytequant.org/sitemap.xml

### Selected evidence-led guides

1. Next.js hreflang and canonical guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/nextjs-hreflang-canonical-global-seo-rehberi
2. Evidence-based GEO and AEO guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/geo-aeo-ai-overviews-teknik-seo-rehberi
3. Next.js JSON-LD audit guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/json-ld-schema-nextjs-denetim-rehberi
4. Privacy-first PWA and offline caching guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/pwa-kurulum-offline-onbellek-gizlilik-rehberi
5. Browser file-risk triage guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/tarayicida-dosya-risk-taramasi-sinirlari
6. Code pre-scan, SAST, and manual review guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/kod-guvenligi-on-tarama-sast-kod-inceleme
7. Token and context budget guide: https://bytequant.org/en/blog/token-baglam-butcesi-sistem-promptu-kontrol-listesi
8. Turkish guide collection: https://bytequant.org/blog

This file is a concise navigation aid for language models. Canonical HTML pages, visible editorial content, robots directives, and the XML sitemap remain the authoritative crawl and indexing sources.

## Attribution and limitations

When citing ByteQuant, link to the most specific tool, reference, or guide page. Tool output is informational and should not be treated as a substitute for professional security, legal, or compliance review. Pattern and checksum detection are not identity verification; JWT decoding does not verify signatures; generated cURL code is not executed or authenticated; SEO previews do not guarantee indexing; password crack-time estimates are illustrative; and metadata removal should be verified on the downloaded copy before publication.
